sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111482" key="filo/smhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-σμηνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111482.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving beehives</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swarms of bees,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:251" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.251</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
